title: S4c: migrate performance-log (23 anchors, 10 unparsed)
action: Standard area migration — identical contract to f2-5, TARGET docs/specs/performance-log.md, expect 23 anchors / 10 unparsed. Read f2-5 and commit 8710d03 as worked examples. Same STEP 0-4, prohibitions, RED-FIRST. Chain grows to 70 suites.

truths: fidelity min/median quoted above the floor with no concept edited
pin declares unparsed_blocks honestly; blob_sha verified
prohibitions: never invent ids for unnumbered blocks (D10)
never edit a concept or lower a threshold

trace.outcome: performance-log migrated: 3 topic concepts (sections lifecycle/measurement, persistent store/sync, cross-project matrix), 23 anchors owned, gate in chain (70 suites)
